Off Calendar Sep-21-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant Ivillage, Inc.'s Motion To Compel Plaintiffs' Further Responses To Discovery Requests is granted with certain limitations. The motion is granted as to Numbers 9, 14, and 15. The motion is granted as to Number 13, deleting the portion of the definition of identify which includes discussions, inquiry, request, and the outcome. The motion is granted as to No. 18, limited to documents which constitute, evidence or depict the exercise of stock options. Further responses shall be made within 20 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
